disclosure: Peek uses the following optional non-AI external services. All AI inference is fully on-device using the QVAC SDK. No user data, conversations, photos, or audio are sent to any server.

services.name: Overpass API
services.purpose: Query OpenStreetMap data for nearby health facilities (hospitals, pharmacies, clinics) in the Nearby Health screen
services.dataShared: User's GPS coordinates and a radius. No personal data.

services.name: OpenStreetMap tile servers
services.purpose: Render the interactive map in the Nearby Health screen
services.dataShared: Tile x/y/z coordinates (standard map tile requests). No personal data.

services.name: Leaflet.js (CDN)
services.purpose: JavaScript library for the interactive map UI loaded in the WebView

services.name: QVAC Model Registry (Hugging Face)
services.purpose: Download AI model files (GGUF format) from the Models screen. Used only when the user explicitly initiates a download.
services.dataShared: Model file requests only. No user content.
